name: LOGOS: A Living Logic for AI Agent Teams That Evolve With Humans
summary: arXiv:2607.10878v1 Announce Type: new Abstract: AI agents are evolving from answer engines into persistent teams that use tools, delegate work, learn from experience, and modify the artifacts that...
description: arXiv:2607.10878v1 Announce Type: new Abstract: AI agents are evolving from answer engines into persistent teams that use tools, delegate work, learn from experience, and modify the artifacts that shape their future behavior. The defining question for deployment is no longer merely what agents can do, but who controls what they are allowed to become. We introduce logos, a pluggable layer for se...
author: Yuma Ichikawa, Yamato Arai, Kosaku Kimura, Akira Sakai, Hiromichi Kobashi
